description_long: This is a square wooden table with a simple, modern design, featuring a flat tabletop and four straight, tapered legs. The wood grain is visible across all surfaces, giving it a natural and warm appearance. The tabletop is moderately thick, with clean, sharp edges and no visible hardware or joints. The legs are attached at each corner, providing stability and a balanced look. There are no drawers, shelves, or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The finish appears smooth and slightly glossy, enhancing the natural wood texture.
description: A square, minimalist wooden table with a smooth, natural finish and four straight, tapered legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square tabletop and two front legs, highlighting the clean lines and wood grain.
description_view_1: Rear view similar to the front, with the same tabletop and leg structure visible, emphasizing symmetry.
description_view_2: Side view showing the tabletop thickness and the alignment of the legs, with wood grain detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the previous side, with clear visibility of the tabletop and leg design.
